feature.name: GoldenEye Leaderboard Spacing + Model Ratio Donut

stories.title: Match leaderboard row spacing to activity log
acceptance: Leaderboard header cells use py-1 (matching ActivityLogTerminal)
Leaderboard body cells use py-1 (matching ActivityLogTerminal)
No text clipping or overflow issues at reduced padding
Sticky header still works correctly when scrolling

changes.description: Change py-1.5 to py-1 on leaderboard <th> elements (lines 438-443) and <td> elements (lines 453-467). Do NOT change py-1.5 in banner divs (lines 392, 410) or the leaderboard header bar py-2 (line 430).

stories.title: Add per-model token aggregation query to useGoldenEyeData
acceptance: New query in fetchFullData groups ai_cost_events by model with SUM of input_tokens and output_tokens
New state modelBreakdown exposed from hook: Array<{ model: string; input_tokens: number; output_tokens: number }>
Top 6 models by total tokens returned; remainder grouped as 'Other'
Query refreshes on the heavy poll cycle (30s), not the lightweight 3s poll

changes.description: Add ModelBreakdown interface. Add useState for modelBreakdown. In fetchFullData, add a new query: supabase.from('ai_cost_events').select('model, input_tokens, output_tokens') then aggregate client-side with a Map<model, {in, out}> since Supabase JS doesn't support GROUP BY directly. Sort by total tokens descending, take top 6, sum remainder as 'Other'. Add modelBreakdown to return object.

stories.title: Create ModelRatioChart donut with stat flags
acceptance: Donut chart (Recharts PieChart with innerRadius) showing token volume per model
Top 6 models + 'Other' bucket with DEFAULT_SANKEY_COLORS palette
Stat flags pointing to each segment showing tokens in / tokens out
Center label showing total token count
Animation disabled (isAnimationActive={false}) to prevent jitter on 3s poll
Integrated into left panel below leaderboard with shrink-0 fixed height
Left panel restructured: leaderboard keeps flex-1 min-h-0, chart gets shrink-0
Matches GoldenEye dark theme (bg-slate-900/60, text-[10px], border-slate-700/50)

changes.description: New file. Import PieChart, Pie, Cell, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer from recharts. Import DEFAULT_SANKEY_COLORS from ParticleFlowCanvas. Props: modelBreakdown array from hook. Render donut with innerRadius ~40, outerRadius ~65 (sized for 440px panel). Custom tooltip with dark theme bg-[#1f2937]. Stat flags as positioned labels outside each segment showing 'In: XXk / Out: XXk'. Center text showing total tokens formatted compact.

Import ModelRatioChart. Restructure left panel (line 428-480): wrap leaderboard in flex-1 min-h-0, add ModelRatioChart below with shrink-0. Pass modelBreakdown from useGoldenEyeData. Add gap-2 between sections.

parallelGroups.reason: Independent: spacing is CSS-only, query is hook-only
Depends on GE-002 for modelBreakdown data
